title: STATUS Dallas Kettle | Electric Cordless Kettle | White with Swivel Base | 1.7 Litre | DALLASKETTLE
features: 1.7 L CAPACITY FOR HOUSEHOLD USE An ideal size for families and everyday use—providing enough hot water for multiple cups of tea or coffee with one swift boil.
2 kW FAST BOIL PERFORMANCE Generates rapid boil speeds to have hot water ready in just minutes, perfect for busy mornings or quick kitchen prep.
360° SWIVEL BASE FOR EASE OF USE Cordless convenience with full rotation; place the kettle on its base at any angle for instant lift-off, ideal for right- or left-handed users.
DUAL WATER INDICATORS FOR CLEAR VISIBILITY Transparent measuring windows on both sides allow easy monitoring of water levels—ensuring safe filling and avoiding spills.

BOIL‑DRY SAFETY AND POWER‑ON LIGHT Automatically shuts off when empty, for safer use; the illuminated indicator confirms the kettle is in operation. Also features a removable filter for cleaner, sediment-free pours.
description: From the manufacturer Perfectly Suited to Every Brew Each kettle in our collection is meticulously crafted to redefine your brewing experience, offering unparalleled performance and style. From sleek designs to advanced features, our kettles are designed to ease your daily routine. Whether you prefer compact options for intimate moments or larger capacities for gatherings, our range has something for everyone. With safety features, easy-to-use handles, and rapid boiling capabilities, our kettles ensure effortless operation and peace of mind. Status Chicago Electric Cordless Kettle Rapid Boiling: Enjoy quick and efficient boiling Versatile Capacity: 1.7 litres Easy-to-Use Features: Effortless pouring and convenient lid Safety First: Automatic shut-off and boil-dry protection Stylish Design: Sleek and modern kettle design Features Match your Aesthetic Impress your kitchen aesthetic with our kettle's sleek design. Available in three stunning options: timeless black, pristine white, and modern stainless steel. Each variant is crafted to complement any kitchen decor, adding a touch of elegance to your countertop. Our kettle's sleek silhouette and minimalist design make it a stylish addition to any home. Removable Filter Better-tasting water with our kettle's removable filter and limescale filter. Designed for your convenience and satisfaction, the removable filter easily lifts out for effortless cleaning, ensuring that your water remains pristine with every use. But that's not all – our kettle goes the extra mile with its limescale filter, effectively reducing mineral buildup and preventing unsightly deposits in your beverages. 1.7 Litre Capacity Choose the perfect size for your brewing, available in capacities ranging from 1 litre to 1.7 litre. Whether you're brewing a single cup of tea or catering to a crowd, we have the ideal options. Need a bit more? Opt for our 1.7-litre kettle, offering ample capacity to prepare multiple servings of your favourite hot beverages. Ergonomic Lid Release Experience convenience with our kettle's ergonomic lid design and lid release button. Our thoughtfully crafted lid opens with ease, providing quick access for filling and cleaning without any hassle. With just a simple press of the lid release button, you can enjoy a seamless refill without the need to remove the lid. Automatic Shut-off With automatic shut-off upon boiling, there's no more worrying about overboiling or forgetting to turn off the kettle. Our intelligent design ensures safety and peace of mind by automatically switching off once the water reaches its boiling point. Stay informed at a glance with our LED indicator, which illuminates to signify when your water is boiling. This intuitive feature removes the guesswork, allowing you to focus on enjoying your perfectly brewed beverage. Cordless Kettles Experience freedom in motion with our cordless kettles. Our cordless design offers unparalleled convenience for your daily brewing rituals. Whether you're filling up your mug on the kitchen counter or serving guests in the living room or dining room, our cordless feature ensures you're never tethered to an outlet.
